name: Odakyu Electric Railway Co., Ltd.
summary: Odakyu Electric Railway Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the transportation, merchandising, real estate, and other businesses in Japan. The company provides services, such as railway, bus, taxi, sightseeing boat, ropeway transportation, etc. It also operates department stores, supermarkets, etc. In addition, the company is involved in the sale of land and buildings, leasing of buildings, etc. Further, it operates hotels, restaurants, travel agencies, golf courses, and advertising agencies. Additionally, the company provides railway maintenance, building management and maintenance, horticulture and gardening, bookkeeping, insurance agency, planning design and operation, and temporary staffing services. Odakyu Electric Railway Co., Ltd. was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
